allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('d:/embed/mas_embedded_threadx/build/compile_commands.json'\)\); print\('Directory:', data[0]['directory']\); print\('Total entries:', len\(data\)\); entries_with_referee = [e for e in data if 'REFEREE' in e.get\('command',''\) or 'referee' in e.get\('file',''\).lower\(\)]; print\('Entries with REFEREE:', len\(entries_with_referee\)\); rc_entries = [e for e in data if 'robot_control.c' in e.get\('file',''\)]; print\('robot_control.c entries:'\); [print\(' ', e['file']\) for e in rc_entries]")
